free_text: Measurement of neutron elastic scattering cross
sections for 12C, 40Ca, and 208Pb at energies from
4FP15L flight path at 90 m from the
spallation target of the Weapons Neutron Research
Center at the Los Alamos Neutron Science Center
Five scintillators for flux monitor, veto
neutrons to charged particle convertors and DE
15 CsI(Tl) detectors to stop and measure

about 3% and statistics error on the efficiency

CH2 cylindrical target of 149.7 g, 7.65 cm high,
Statistics error on the neutron energy is

40Ca cylindrical target of 165.7 g, 5.126 cm high,
Statistics error on the neutron energy is
